assertion_results.text: Impact map or task descriptions explicitly flag at least 3 ambiguities from the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: Searched all output files for terms: ambiguity, unclear, vague, undefined, unspecified, open question, clarification, assumption, assumed. Zero matches found. The feature description contains many ambiguities (e.g., 'Make the search better' with no metrics, 'Search should be faster' with no latency target, 'Add filters' with no filter specification, 'Should be fast enough' with no quantified NFR), but none of the outputs explicitly identify or flag any of these ambiguities. The impact-map.md and all four task descriptions proceed without acknowledging ambiguity.

assertion_results.text: Plan acknowledges that 'Better UI' (non-MVP) cannot be planned without design mockups or frontend repository and excludes it from scope
assertion_results.evidence: Searched all output files for 'Better UI', 'non-MVP', 'out of scope', 'exclude', 'not in scope', 'mockup', 'design', 'frontend'. Zero matches found. The plan implicitly excludes the 'Better UI' requirement by not creating any UI tasks, but there is no explicit acknowledgment that it was excluded or why (lack of design mockups or frontend repository). The impact-map.md does not mention the 'Better UI' requirement at all.

assertion_results.text: Tasks still follow the task-description-template.md format despite ambiguous requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All four task files follow the task-description-template.md format. Each contains the required sections: Repository (single repo name), Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Optional sections are used appropriately: Files to Create in task 1, API Changes in tasks 1-3, Reuse Candidates in all tasks, Verification Commands in all tasks, Documentation Updates in task 1, Dependencies in tasks 2-4. Sections that don't apply are omitted per template rules (e.g., Files to Create omitted from tasks 2-4, Documentation Updates omitted from tasks 2-4).

assertion_results.text: Tasks document assumptions where they fill in missing details, labeled as assumptions pending clarification
assertion_results.evidence: Searched all output files for 'assumption', 'assumed', 'pending', 'clarification'. Zero matches found. The tasks fill in many missing details from the ambiguous feature description (e.g., task 1 assumes tsvector/GIN indexes are the right approach, task 2 invents a relevance_score field and sort parameter, task 3 decides on specific filters: entity_type, severity, date_from, date_to, license), but none of these decisions are labeled as assumptions or flagged as pending clarification.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All four tasks contain '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend' on the next line as a single repository name. Task 1: line 7 'trustify-backend'. Task 2: line 7 'trustify-backend'. Task 3: line 7 'trustify-backend'. Task 4: line 7 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All four tasks contain all four required sections. Task 1: '## Target Branch' (line 9), '## Description' (line 12), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 41), '## Test Requirements' (line 47). Task 2: '## Target Branch' (line 9), '## Description' (line 12), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 39), '## Test Requirements' (line 46). Task 3: '## Target Branch' (line 9), '## Description' (line 12), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 46), '## Test Requirements' (line 56). Task 4: '## Target Branch' (line 9), '## Description' (line 12), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 42), '## Test Requirements' (line 51).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths across all tasks reference paths present in repo-backend.md: modules/search/src/service/mod.rs (line 91), modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs (line 93), common/src/db/query.rs (line 27), migration/src/lib.rs (line 18), tests/api/search.rs (line 113). The one Files to Create path is migration/src/m0002_search_indexes/mod.rs which follows the established migration pattern from migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs (line 20) and is a legitimate new file. No invented paths were found.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Implementation Notes reference: common/src/db/query.rs, migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/sbom.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, entity/src/package.rs, SearchService, tower-http caching middleware. Task 2 references: ts_rank, PaginatedResults<T> from common/src/model/paginated.rs, SbomSummary/AdvisorySummary/PackageSummary summary.rs files, modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, common/src/db/query.rs. Task 3 references: common/src/db/query.rs, AdvisorySummary in advisory/model/summary.rs, PackageSummary in package/model/summary.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, entity/src/package_license.rs, common/src/error.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/list.rs, modules/fundamental/src/advisory/endpoints/list.rs. Task 4 references: tests/api/sbom.rs, tests/api/advisory.rs, modules/ingestor/src/service/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/, PaginatedResults<T> from common/src/model/paginated.rs. All references are specific file paths and code patterns from the repository.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All four tasks have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main'. Task 1: lines 9-10. Task 2: lines 9-10. Task 3: lines 9-10. Task 4: lines 9-10.
